creator: chogata@moosefs.com
text:
3.4 refers to FUSE API version or whatever you want to call it - basically what version of FUSE library calls we are using. 

7.x is the library - kernel protocol, we cannot influence that, we are just checking which version is in use and we have some conditions in code for versions (basically if version is lower than 7.23 we add some workarounds for some bugs, otherwise no workarounds are needed AND we allow cache invalidation calls).
